summary: Canned curate output for `cairn test` (the stub executor replays this tree): two promotions of the shape a real curation run produces.

proposals.learning: Agents kept re-deriving where the canonical input lives; two runs read a stale copy
proposals.text:
## Canonical inputs

Read inputs only from the artifacts named in your CONTRACT block — never from a path remembered from an earlier run.
proposals.rationale: Recurred across two runs and caused rework; belongs in the doctrine every agent inherits.

proposals.learning: The operator eyeballs every run's output for a missing title field
proposals.text:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""has-title — the artifact carries a non-empty title. argv: run_dir, name, path."""
import json, sys
from pathlib import Path

doc = json.loads((Path(sys.argv[1]) / sys.argv[3]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
if not doc.get("title"):
    print("missing or empty 'title'")
    raise SystemExit(1)
proposals.rationale: Checked by eye three runs in a row — the maturation ladder says encode it as a validator.
